Remittitur Received the true findings on the prior strike and serious felony allegations are reversed and defendant's sentence is vacated. The matter is remanded to the trial court for full resentencing. Following resentencing, the court shall issue a new abstract of judgment and forward it to the Department of Corrections and Rehabilitation. The judgment is otherwise affirmed.
